ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of spectators the track can hold */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Type of track surface (e.g., dirt, turf) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the track opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the race was held */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "purse" REAL /* Purse amount for the race */,
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race type */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Length of the race in furlongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the race was held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the race started */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the track (e.g., fast, sloppy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_type_id") REFERENCES race_type ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the horse */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the horse */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the horse */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the horse */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the jockey */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the jockey */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the jockey */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number for the jockey */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Total earnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number for the trainer */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Total earnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "odds" REAL /* Starting odds for the horse */,
  "post_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse */,
  "final_time" TEXT /* Final time of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position of the horse */,
  "distance_covered" INTEGER /* Distance covered by the horse */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the horse during the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time taken to finish the race */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the horse */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Chart data for the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES race_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_type" (
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "race_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  "min_purse" REAL /* Minimum purse for the race type */,
  "max_purse" REAL /* Maximum purse for the race type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "min_distance" INTEGER /* Minimum distance for the grade */,
  "max_distance" INTEGER /* Maximum distance for the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  "average_height" REAL /* Average height of the breed */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the breed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
